response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, seasoned generalist with genuine strengths in testing culture, developer tooling, and mentoring, but he does not meet the core minimum qualifications for this role. His C++ exposure amounts to roughly seven months at National Instruments plus a thesis project, far short of the required 8 years; his day-to-day languages are TypeScript, Node.js, and D. His large-scale infrastructure experience is real but narrow (about two years of low-latency work at Dunnhumby), and he has no formal technical-leadership or cloud compute platform ownership on record. The resume also contains a confusing 'Founder, Datadog' entry that appears to mislabel an open-source side project, which would need clarification.
strengths: 15+ years of broad, full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded
Proven low-latency, high-throughput systems work at Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP requests/sec)
Strong mentoring and knowledge-sharing track record (workshops, courses, coding dojos, conference talks)
concerns: C++ experience (~7 months professional) falls drastically short of the required 8 years
No formal technical-lead role or experience owning cloud compute platform strategy
Resume inconsistency: 'Founder, Datadog' entry appears to mislabel an unrelated open-source side project

key_factors.factor: Limited cloud platform and technical-leadership experience
